entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Kwa-inspir, umgomo wethu ukwenza ukufunda kube okwawo wonke umuntu ngokukwenza kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, futhi kujabulise kubo bonke. Sikholelwa ukuthi wonke umuntu unelungelo lemfundo esezingeni, kungakhathaliseki isizinda noma izimo zakhe. Inkundla yethu yakhelwe ukunikeza abafundi amathuluzi nezinsiza abazidingayo ukuze baphumelele, iphinde ikhuthaze uthando lokufunda. Silwela ukudala umphakathi ofaka wonke umuntu, owesekayo, nowenza abantu babe namandla, lapho abafundi bengaxhumana khona bodwa nabafundisi abavela emhlabeni wonke. Ngokwenza ukufunda kujabulise futhi kufinyeleleke, sihlose ukugqugquzela isizukulwane sabafundi bempilo yonke abakulungele ukubhekana nezinselele zesikhathi esizayo.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: I-CalOPPA ngumthetho wokuqala wombuso ezweni odinga amawebhusayithi ezentengiselwano nezinsizakalo eziku-inthanethi ukuthi zishicilele inqubomgomo yobumfihlo. Ububanzi bomthetho budlulela kude neCalifornia ukuze budinge umuntu noma inkampani e-United States (futhi okungenzeka emhlabeni) esebenzisa amawebhusayithi aqoqa ulwazi oluhlonza umuntu kumakhasimende aseCalifornia ukuthi ifake inqubomgomo yobumfihlo ebonakala ngokusobala kuwebhusayithi yayo, esho ngqo ulwazi oluqoqwayo nalabo abantu ababelwana nabo ngalo, futhi ilandele le nqubomgomo.

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Okokuqala ngqa, ikoloni langaphambili elalingenawo umlando wesizwe wangaphambilini laba amandla omhlaba. Amakhosi nezindlovukazi zaseYurophu zagumbuqelwa, futhi i-United States of America yavela njengophawu lwentando yeningi, ubungxiwankulu, nomhlaba okhululekile. Ngesikhathi esifanayo, kwavela umbono omusha wobukhomanisi futhi i-Soviet Union yaba ukubonakala kwawo okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.

Uma unemibuzo noma ukukhathazeka ngalesi saziso sobumfihlo noma imikhuba yethu ephathelene nolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, sicela uxhumane nathi ku-support@inspir.app. Uma uvakashela iwebhusayithi yethu https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu zeselula, njengoba kungase kube njalo ("App"), futhi ngokujwayelekile usebenzisa noma yiziphi izinsizakalo zethu ("Services", ezihlanganisa i-Website ne-App), siyakwazisa ukuthi usithemba ngolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Sithatha ubumfihlo bakho ngokungathi sína kakhulu. Kulesi saziso sobumfihlo, sifuna ukukuchazela ngendlela ecace ngangokunokwenzeka ukuthi yiluphi ulwazi esiluqoqayo, silusebenzisa kanjani, nokuthi yimaphi amalungelo onawo ngalo. Sithemba ukuthi uzothatha isikhathi sokusifunda ngokucophelela, ngoba sibalulekile. Uma kukhona imigomo kulesi saziso sobumfihlo ongavumelani nayo, sicela uyeke ukusebenzisa ama-Services ethu ngokushesha. Lesi saziso sobumfihlo sisebenza kulo lonke ulwazi oluqoqwa ngama-Services ethu (okuhlanganisa, njengoba kuchazwe ngenhla, i-Website ne-App yethu), kanye nanoma yiziphi izinsizakalo ezihlobene, ukuthengisa, ukumaketha noma imicimbi. Sicela ufunde lesi saziso sobumfihlo ngokucophelela ngoba sizokusiza uqonde ukuthi senzani ngolwazi esiluqoqayo. Imigomo Nemibandela yethu ilawula konke ukusetshenziswa kwe-Service yethu futhi kanye neNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo kwakha isivumelwano sakho nathi (“Agreement”).

entries.value: Izigaba zolwazi lomuntu siqu esiziqoqile ngawe. Izigaba zemithombo esiqoqa kuyo ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Ukususa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Uma wenza lesi sicelo, sizosusa emarekhodini ethu ulwazi lomuntu siqu esinalo ngawe ngosuku lwesicelo sakho futhi siqondise noma yibaphi abahlinzeki besevisi ukuthi benze okufanayo. Kwezinye izimo, ukususa kungafezwa ngokwenza ulwazi lungakwazi ukuhlonza umuntu. Uma ukhetha ukususa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, ungase ungakwazi ukusebenzisa imisebenzi ethile edinga ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ukuze isebenze. Ukumisa ukuthengiswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Asiluthengisi noma siluqashe ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kunoma yibaphi abantu besithathu nganoma iyiphi injongo. Asiluthengisi ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ngenani lemali. Nokho, kwezinye izimo, ukudluliswa kolwazi lomuntu siqu kumuntu wesithathu, noma emndenini wethu wezinkampani, ngaphandle kwenkokhelo yemali kungase kubhekwe “njengokuthengisa” ngaphansi komthetho waseCalifornia. Nguwe kuphela umnikazi we-Personal Data yakho futhi ungacela ukudalulwa noma ukusulwa noma nini. Uma uthumela isicelo sokumisa ukuthengiswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, sizoyeka ukwenza lezo zidluliso. Sicela uqaphele, uma usicela ukuthi sisuse noma siyeke ukuthengisa idatha yakho, kungase kuthinte isipiliyoni sakho nathi, futhi ungase ungakwazi ukubamba iqhaza kwezinye izinhlelo noma izinsizakalo zobulungu ezidinga ukusetshenziswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ukuze zisebenze. Kodwa ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo, ngeke sikubandlulule ngenxa yokusebenzisa amalungelo akho. Ukuze usebenzise amalungelo akho okuvikela idatha aseCalifornia achazwe ngenhla, sicela uthumele izicelo zakho nge-imeyili: support@inspir.app Amalungelo akho okuvikela idatha achazwe ngenhla avikelwe yi-CCPA, isifinyezo se-California Consumer Privacy Act. Ukuze ufunde okwengeziwe, vakashela iwebhusayithi esemthethweni ye-California Legislative Information. I-CCPA yaqala ukusebenza ngo-01/01/2020.

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: Siyazihlonipha izimpawu ze-Do Not Track futhi asilandeleli, asifaki amakhukhi, noma sisebenzise ukukhangisa lapho indlela ye-Do Not Track yesiphequluli isebenza. I-Do Not Track iyintandokazi ongayisetha esipheqululini sakho sewebhu ukwazisa amawebhusayithi ukuthi awufuni ukulandelwa. Ungavula noma uvale i-Do Not Track ngokuvakashela ikhasi le-Preferences noma Settings lesiphequluli sakho sewebhu. Uma ungaphansi kweminyaka engu-18, uhlala eCalifornia, futhi une-akhawunti ebhalisiwe ne-Service, unelungelo lokucela ukususwa kwedatha engafuneki oyithumela obala kuma-Services. Ukuze ucele ukususwa kwedatha enjalo, sicela uxhumane nathi usebenzisa imininingwane yokuxhumana enikezwe ngezansi, futhi ufake ikheli le-imeyili elihlotshaniswa ne-akhawunti yakho nesitatimende sokuthi uhlala eCalifornia. entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Umlando Womhlaba kuzo zonke izikhathi ubufana nokuhlehlisa ukubuka isithombe, isithombe esasihlala sishintsha. Amakhulu eminyaka aholela ekhulwini le-19 amaka iphuzu lokuguquka emlandweni wesintu, njengoba umhlaba wasuka embonweni oyisicaba nonomkhawulo waya ekuqondeni okwandayo kwezindawo ezintsha namakoloni. I-French Revolution yamaka okokuqala lapho inani elikhulu labantu lahlelana khona ukubhikisha nokusungula imigomo yenkululeko, ukulingana, nobuzalwane. Izehlakalo zeMpi Yezwe II nazo zabumba umhlaba wekhulu leminyaka elilandelayo futhi zabeka isisekelo sekhulu lama-21.
